title: Neee Lyrics Yaakkai Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Neee Lyrics Yaakkai Song Lyrics
Music: Yuvan Shankar Raja
Singer: Yuvan Shankar Raja
Lyrics: Na Muthukumar

en kangal
unnai thaedudhe.
kannaadi pola
keerudhey.
en aaval ellai
meerudhey.

oru padapadapil
konjam thudi thudippil
konjam norungugiren
adi sidharugiren.

en kadhal undhan
kadhil serumo..
en swasa kaattru
ennai theendumo.

indha idhayam oru
siru unjaladi
adhu un dhisayil
dhinam aadudhadi.
dhinam alaipaaindhae
thaedudhey.

Kai jaadai paarthu
kadhal vandhadhey
kanjaadai nenjil
modhal thandhadhey.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Neee?

The song Neee expresses deep feelings of love and longing, highlighting the emotional connection between the lovers.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie Yaakkai?

In Yaakkai, the song plays during a pivotal moment that showcases the protagonist's feelings for his beloved, enhancing the romantic narrative of the film.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Yuvan Shankar Raja, who is also the music director, known for his unique style and captivating compositions.

When was the song Neee released?

Neee was released on February 13, 2016, coinciding with the romantic vibes of Valentine's season.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Neee, the protagonist expresses his deep yearning and affection for his beloved, encapsulating the essence of romantic love. The song's poignant lyrics by Na Muthukumar, combined with Yuvan's soulful rendition, evoke a sense of nostalgia and longing. Set against the backdrop of Yaakkai, this melody serves as a heartfelt reminder of the beauty and pain of love. The emotional depth of the song resonates with anyone who has experienced the complexities of romantic relationships.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Neee from Yaakkai is a mesmerizing romantic ballad that beautifully captures the essence of longing and love. With Yuvan's soulful voice and heartfelt lyrics by Na Muthukumar, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the pangs of love. Dive into this enchanting melody that promises to tug at your heartstrings and leave you yearning for more.
stanzaMeanings: You are the god that my eyes always seek.
You and I live together without saying anything about love.
My eyes search for you. They shine like a mirror. My heart is not hidden from you.
You... you are my daytime dream that captures me, and I am like a child.
In a rhythm, I feel a little excitement and a little pain, I am getting lost in it.
Like a wave, I am drifting away during the time you are with me.
Girl, girl, I am following you, lying down like your shadow.
When I see you, my heart feels like a puppy that is lost.
Does my love connect with your love? Will the breeze take me away?
This heart is like a small swing, it dances every day in your direction. Every day it searches for you.
Love has come looking at my hair, it has first entered my heart.
